Pertanyaan asli user: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A medium shot of an anime-style man with short black hair, a prominent mustache, and dark eyebrows. He has a stern, slightly sinister expression, with his eyes narrowed and a subtle smirk on his lips. He is wearing a dark blue polo shirt with white piping along the collar and shoulders, and a small red accent on the chest pocket. The background is a soft-focus, blurred depiction of green foliage, suggesting an outdoor setting. The lighting is even and natural, with no harsh shadows. The color palette is dominated by blues and greens, with the man's dark hair and skin tones providing contrast. The overall mood is one of quiet intensity and subtle menace. The art style is reminiscent of late 1990s or early 2000s anime, with clean lines and a somewhat realistic portrayal of facial features.
